non_claims: not evidence of empirical superiority outside the bundled fixture
not a network or LLM-evidence claim

statistical_methods.name: Wilson score accuracy intervals
statistical_methods.scope: baseline and evaluated candidates on the bundled offline fixture

statistical_methods.name: deterministic bootstrap intervals
statistical_methods.scope: accepted-candidate accuracy and macro-F1 uncertainty on the bundled offline fixture

statistical_methods.name: exact McNemar paired comparison
statistical_methods.scope: matched baseline-vs-accepted correctness on the local test split

statistical_methods.name: bootstrap rank-stability frequencies
statistical_methods.scope: candidate ordering stability within the configured candidate budget

claims.statement: Can the template express a bounded AutoResearch loop without autonomous execution? Evidence is grounded in `output/reports/autoresearch_loop.md`.
Can a deterministic candidate loop evaluate and select a small MNIST neural-network configuration under budget? Evidence is grounded in `output/data/ml_task_results.json`.
Are manuscript claims grounded in generated project artifacts? Evidence is grounded in `output/reports/evidence_registry.json`.
Can readiness checks be rerun from the standard validation stage? Evidence is grounded in `output/reports/autoresearch_readiness.json`.
Does the benchmark ledger record metric improvement, budget compliance, and offline execution? Evidence is grounded in `output/reports/ml_benchmark_score.json`.
Does the local security layer record artifact-integrity evidence without claiming external signing? Evidence is grounded in `output/data/autoresearch_integrity_attestation.json`.

review_state.approval_boundary: generated outputs can be ready for review but cannot self-approve publication
